phm.headline_note: Disagreements are concentrated in broader public-data-access sensitivity cases; strict A1 calls remain high precision.

ijphm.headline_note: The strict IJPHM sample matched after targeted fixes for repository links, reference-only URLs, and generic system-language false positives.

combined.strict_policy_note: Strict A1-A5 results remain official. Benchmark and externally public dataset access are tracked as a separate appendix-facing dimension.
combined.intentional_conservatism_note: The analyzer is conservative by design and may undercall broader public-data access when no author-controlled artifact release is stated.
